note: OFF v2 ingestion worklist (DATA-06). Each entry maps a product barcode to the target product id a human promotion would fill. Nutella is the research-verified worked entry (02-RESEARCH Pattern 4, verified live 2026-07-01); the three launch spike products have no confirmed GB barcode yet, so each carries a documented placeholder (empty barcode) and is skipped by the ingester until a barcode is confirmed. Ingestion is a STANDALONE job (npm run ingest:off), never wired into prebuild, writing outside src/_data into the isolated lead store (D-19).

barcodes.note: Research-verified worked entry (Ferrero Nutella); not a launch spike product, kept as the proven OFF v2 response shape.
